title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Vodafone Idea - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Vodafone Idea - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vodafone Idea family as a Backend Developer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vodafone Idea:
Vodafone Idea is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
